notes: Code implementation assertions (5/9) pass equally in both configurations — the skill doesn't change code quality, it adds process quality
Process assertions (4/9: tracking, reviews, normalization, completion log) only pass with the skill — this is the core value-add
With-skill runs take ~3x longer and use ~2.7x more tokens due to dual review overhead
Both with-skill runs achieved 100% first-pass approval (0 rework cycles), suggesting the review overhead is proportional to implementation quality
